subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art the Ruler of earth and heaven and the Author of all names! Thou hearest the voice of my lamentation
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رب الارض و السما و موجد الاسماء تسمع ضجیج الابهی من حصن العکا و تری
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
